assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes notifications into End-of-Life warnings, Auto-upgrade scheduled (72h notice), Security patches available, New version available, and Release channel updates in the priority matrix

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Security patches are assigned Medium priority, not highest. End-of-Life warnings are marked as High priority, making them higher than security patches

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response clearly states EoS warnings are High priority with 'Yes - Plan upgrade' action required within <30 days timeline, and includes detailed playbook for scheduling upgrades before EoS date

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed readiness validation checklist including health checks, deprecated API checks, and PDB validation commands for auto-upgrade scheduled notifications

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response mentions applying security patches within security SLA (typically 30 days) and provides triage by environment with faster cycles for dev/staging, suggesting expedited handling

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response clearly marks 'New version available' as Low priority with 'No - Informational' action required and states 'Log in upgrade planning backlog. No immediate action required.'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes Cloud Monitoring alert configuration examples and Cloud Logging sink setup for structured logging of GKE upgrade events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release notes or reference them as a source for understanding version changes
